result:
ONNX contract confirmed: `[1,3,128,128]` input → `[[u, v, conf]]` output, ~2.98 MiB. Everything matches the frozen contracts. The implementation is complete:

- `model/model.py`: removed the banned MobileNetV3-Small trunk and its checkpoint entirely; added `DelightTranslator` (residual delight filter, ~50k params) and a from-scratch 4-stage conv trunk; removed the exp-12 dark-expert head/gate; `forward()` now runs translator → trunk sequentially and optionally returns the canonicalized image for training supervision.
- `model/train.py`: `sample_epoch` now also draws pixel-aligned clean-reference crops from `reference.tif`; the training loop adds a 1.0-weighted L1 translator loss to the existing loss every step; the optimizer collapsed to a single param group (no more pretrained-trunk LR split); `info` logs the new from-scratch init string and final-epoch translate loss.

Syntax check, a forward/backward pass, and ONNX export/inference all verified working within contract.
